Unified Import/Export — interface walkthrough & full-fidelity proof

Generated 2026-06-11 · local stack · Playwright + API round-trip · entity: booking_resources (S61)
Interface works ✓ Export: 9 rows × 15 fields ✓ UI import: created 0, updated 9, skipped 0, errors 0 ✓ Round-trip: 15/15 fields preserved ✓

1 · The interface (Playwright screenshots)

Logged into the admin, opened Settings → Import/Export — the single manifest-driven page that serves every entity. The 8 newly-onboarded catalog entities (highlighted) now appear alongside the core/CMS ones:

3 · One UI bug found & fixed

The unified import UI (vbwd-fe-core ImportExportPage) threw useDataExchange: entityKey is required for this call for any single-entity JSON upload — the file-upload path never derived the target entity. Fixed: runImport() now derives the entity_key from the envelope (the top-level rows-array key; falls back to the file name). After the fix the UI import returns created 0, updated 9, skipped 0, errors 0. All 40 fe-core data-exchange unit tests stay green; dist rebuilt.
